This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
The Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF increase by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
At the start of battle, if there are any "Beast" enemies, Casiah's {STR} Generation +[Arg3]% during this battle. After {Poof!} is released for the first time each turn, it triggers the {Aftershock} effect of the card shuffled into the Draw Pile
